items.title: As French far-right leader Marine Le Pen's appeal trial ends, her presidential bid is at stake
items.description: A Paris appeals court set a verdict date of July 7 for Marine Le Pen in her European Union misuse of funds case

items.title: Russian drone attack kills a father and 3 children in Ukraine while pregnant mother survives
items.description: A Russian drone has struck a home in Ukraine's Kharkiv region in an attack that killed a father and his three small children

items.title: Kraft Heinz pauses plans to split into 2 companies, says its problems are 'fixable'
items.description: Kraft Heinz said Wednesday it’s pausing its plans to split into two companies

items.title: Argentina's monthly inflation ticks up as Milei faces backlash over an outdated index
items.description: Inflation in crisis-prone Argentina accelerated more than expected and for a fifth straight month in January

items.title: The economy is booming. So why is the job market lagging?
items.description: U.S. employers added a surprisingly strong 130,000 jobs last month, but government revisions cut 2024-2025 U.S. payrolls by hundreds of thousands
